description: Intermittent cooling issue should retrieve its known source conversations. Issue from conv_12926084.

issue.customer_description: Pod gets ice cold for 10 min then goes back to neutral.
symptoms: Pod gets ice cold for 10 min then goes back to neutral.
The issue is intermittent - happens maybe 3 out of 5 nights.
issue.resolution_summary: A replacement Pod 3 Cover was approved due to the recurring intermittent cooling issue.
